name: Wuyan

skills.name: Petrifying Strike
skills.description:
Skills and Basic Attacks have a chance to petrify enemy heroes.
Passive: Periodically gains a shield.

skills.name: Storm and Stress
skills.description: Dashes to the target location and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.

skills.name: Shock and Awe
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range.

skills.name: Hurricane Hammer
skills.description:
Spins her hammer for a period of time, continuously dealing damage to nearby enemies.
While the skill is active, gains a Movement Speed boost and shield.

skillsZh.name: 石之鍊金
skillsZh.description:
技能和普攻有機率石化敵方英雄。
被動：每隔一段時間，自身獲得護盾值。

skillsZh.name: 狂飆突進
skillsZh.description: 向指定位置突進，並強化下次普攻，造成額外傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 震懾打擊
skillsZh.description: 對指定區域的敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 颶風之錘
skillsZh.description:
旋轉大錘一段時間，對自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人持續造成傷害。
技能持續期間，自身獲得移速提升和護盾值。

tips: Build: Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might, Frostscar's Embrace.
tipsZh: 鍾無艷（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.14%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、強者破軍、冰痕之握.

patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Wuyan's ability to hit the enemy with the center of her Skill 2 attack plays a huge part in her overall performance, so we've made adjustments to help her perform more consistently across different situations. At the same time, we've made adjustments to her skills' stat bonuses to give players more options in terms of her equipment."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「目前鍾無艷是否能用2技能中心區域命中敵人，大大決定了她的表現，因此我們縮減了不同情形的差異；同時調整了技能的屬性加成結構，讓她能有不同的出裝嘗試。」

faqs.question: Is Wuyan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Wuyan is Tier B Tank with 51.14% win rate, 0.34% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Wuyan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might, Frostscar's Embrace, Ominous Premonition, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Wuyan?
faqs.answer: Pick Lam, Ming, Pei. Strong into Kongming, Lady Zhen, Liang.

faqsZh.question: 鍾無艷 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鍾無艷 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.14%、選取 0.34%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鍾無艷 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、強者破軍、冰痕之握、不祥徵兆、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鍾無艷？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Lam、Ming、Pei。鍾無艷 克制 Kongming、Lady Zhen、Liang。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kongming, Lady Zhen, Liang. Weak into: Lam, Ming, Pei.

guide.overview: Wuyan is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.8% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Wuyan: Skills and Basic Attacks have a chance to petrify enemy heroes.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Glacial Buckler, then complete Blazing Cape, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Wuyan's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Storm and Stress → Shock and Awe → Hurricane Hammer → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Hurricane Hammer (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Storm and Stress, and Hurricane Hammer on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Storm and Stress → Shock and Awe → Hurricane Hammer → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Wuyan sits at Tier B globally (50.8% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Wuyan vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Wuyan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Wuyan vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 1.5% more often globally. Choose Wuyan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Wuyan excels into Kongming, Lady Zhen, Liang. Avoid blind picking into Lam, Ming, Pei without team peel.
